reviews.review_description: Game is fast paced as the zombies just keep coming, and feels great using the variety of weapons. The upgrade system is great allowing for customization and it feels going back to old levels with your upgraded weapons to up your score. I've been working on climbing the leaderboard and it has me hooked as I work to be at the top of all the levels leaderboards. If you love chaotic, high-speed shoot'em ups, that force you to make quick time decisions this game fits the bill perfectly.

reviews.review_title: Battle Of Nowhere is an addictive blast!
reviews.review_description:
I'll often start playing this game for fun, then suddenly multiple hours have vanished. Battle of Nowhere's smooth gunplay, sick explosions, vast enemy types, and and varied levels make you want to keep playing, even for just one more run. The game will often receive updates that revolutionize the experience, with the new Gunsmith system in particular letting you tweak your weapons for a greater sense of progression. This feature will especially help you beat the game's insane boss fights. If you like shooting, upgrading, and flexing on the leaderboard, this game is for you.

5/5, I'll definitely keep playing this game long into the future!

Are you joking me? How could I and how would I not get this? The price point is very reasonable, not pricey. The gameplay is genius, on the level of profound. I just could not say enough good things about this app.
Just in my library one day
I got this for free but don’t know how

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for your kind review. Because you downloaded this game before version 0.1, this game was released for free before version 0.1.

reviews.review_description: Battle of Nowhere is a fast-paced shooting game. There is no unnecessary drama story. Open it, and you can directly enter the game's core content - shooting monsters. The unique comic art style suits me well. The game is still in development, but it provides three weapons with different characteristics to deal with different scenarios. It also includes a variety of weapon upgrades. The most refreshing part is that this game can dual-wield weapons, one for each hand, which feels like a super agent in the movie. Coupled with rich visual and sound effects, it is full of immersion. I am very much looking forward to the new content and new scenes in the future. I hope the production team can add new monsters, AI, and weapons.

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for your kind review. Your review is invaluable for the further development of the game.
